g.text: Push open the great brass door and go in...
Ask Vane about the four halls.
Keep the Clockloft and mend the pendulum...
Keep the Whispering Gallery and find the...
Keep the Cistern and hold back the flood...
Keep the Cartway and free the midnight c...
Study the three faults with Junia.
Re-cut the worn escapement pallet at the...
Climb the frame to free the jammed count...
Rebalance the pendulum bob with trim-wei...
Temper it in the quench, the slow sure w...
Fit it green and race the clock.
Set the hardened pallet and watch the ti...
Nurse the failing pallet toward midnight...
Climb down and read the old marks.
Add a name to the log.
Trust the math and lock the weights.
Chase perfection with one more weight.
Watch the pendulum find its stride.
Learn the three ways to catch the true e...
Trace the false echo to its source horn.
Sit the focus-stone and sift the words b...
Climb the catwalk to the master horn.
Close in on the loud horn.
Re-aim the horn to cancel the false echo...
Pull the baffle and silence the horn.
Carry the true message to the sender.
Reconstruct the blurred message with Dor...
Call the last of the message.
Trust Doran and stay inside the rail.
Trust the voice and cross onto the old g...
Grab for the rail as the gantry gives.
Look over the failing works with Marlow.
Pick a way to hold the pressure.
Dive to find and plug the leaking seam.
Work the hand-pumps to refill the tank.
Shut the great stop-valve on the leaking...
Feel along the main for the leak.
Set the proper clamp, the strong slow fi...
Pack it fast with lead wool.
Set the pumping rhythm with Marlow.
Hold the pace against the clock.
Pump the tank the last of the way full.
Let the full tank feed the signal.
Set both hands to the frozen wheel.
Brace it slow and steady with Marlow.
Throw all your weight against it at once...
Walk the wheel around, turn by turn.
Scramble back from the failing valve.
Join Effie at the tube board.
Read the routing board with Effie.
Choose a route to the jammed capsule.
Crawl the service duct and clear the jam...
Reroute the air pressure to blow it free...
Send a chaser capsule to knock it loose.
Ease the flap and free the capsule whole...
Shove it through hard and fast.
Cradle the freed capsule and back out.
Send the capsule to the station.
Close the branch valves one by one.
Bank the pressure behind the jam.
Track the freed capsule down the board.
Send the chaser soft and true.
Send the chaser hard, one shot to settle...
Search the board for any sign of the cap...
